examples.prompt: 使用 OpenAppCLI 提取 Bilibili 热门视频
examples.response:
✅ AI Agent executed: openappcli.bilibili.hot
📺 Retrieved 10 hot videos via MCP protocol

✅ AI Agent executed: openappcli.genshin.daily_quests
🎮 All daily quests completed successfully

examples.prompt: 自动点赞 Instagram 前5个帖子
examples.response:
✅ AI Agent executed: openappcli.instagram.like_posts --count 5
❤️ Successfully liked 5 posts
